retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the refcount operations are incidental to internal buffer management, not the primary purpose.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to build and send a netlink TP_METER notification message. It does not manage reference counts of any object exposed to the caller; the only reference-counted object (sk_buff) is internal and either passed to netlink multicast or freed. No refcount acquisition/release is returned to the caller.
